changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option_set; CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option_set AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_set_id, os.id AS option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, os.code AS option_set_code, os.name AS option_set_name, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), os.name)) AS option_set_name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), os.name)) AS option_set_name_ar, os.last_modified_by, GREATEST(COALESCE(os.created_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp), COALESCE(os.last_modified_date, '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS source_last_modified_at FROM public.option_set os;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option_set;

changeSet.author: hamza

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_set_slm;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_set_uid_uniq;
DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF EXISTS idx_analytics_dim_option_set_slm_uid;
